channel.title: WebMIDI on Curious Electric
channel.description: Recent content in WebMIDI on Curious Electric

item.title: A browser-based editor for the Oberheim Matrix 1000
item.description: The Oberheim Matrix 1000 is a beloved analog synth from 1984 with a famously cryptic front panel — a handful of buttons for a hundred hidden parameters. So we gave it a proper editor that runs entirely in the browser.

item.title: Oberheim Matrix 1000 Editor
item.description: A browser-based, real-time patch editor for the classic Oberheim Matrix 1000 analog synthesizer — no installation, no backend.
